interventions.Goal: Achieve passing grades in all core subjects.
Participate positively in group activities 4 out of 5 times.
Improve reading level by one grade level within 6 weeks.
Attend school on time every day for 30 consecutive days.

Use conflict resolution strategies instead of physical responses.

Improve reading level by one grade level within 6 weeks.
Demonstrate respectful behavior in all classes for 2 weeks.
Complete all homework assignments on time for 4 consecutive weeks.
Reduce office referrals from 3 per month to 0.
